comment_content:
I used to tolerate this guy and desperately wanted to see him chill down and the people welcome him, I even got a kick out of his colorful behavior, but turns out he just wants everyone to adapt to him while he refuses to adapt in return. To quote a leading columnist in Norway - Shazia Majid - who herself is of immigrant background, after she saw the documentary she wrote: 

"What an ugly thing to do to the King and Queen. Durek Verrett's portrayal of the royal couple is incorrect and undermines the fight against racism. We are incredibly lucky with our royal couple. King Harald and Queen Sonja have been a unifying force, not a divisive one. Especially for those of us with an ethnic minority background. While Princess Märtha Louise's husband Durek Verrett portrays the royal couple as separated from Norwegian society and its realities, ignorant and naive, even almost prejudiced - in line with an old trope about white people as detached from reality and without understanding of other people's lives. The portrayal is so grossly incorrect it becomes outrageous - for most Norwegians, but especially those with an ethnic minority background. Those of us who from time to time have felt outside the community, but who has always been embraced by the King and Queen...

(she cites numerous examples of how they have, well ahead of their time, all the way since the 1970s have actively worked to include minorities and front minority causes, but this is well known to any Norwegian, on this subject they are miles ahead of most people from their age group, before she continues)

The royal couple's inclusion is exemplary. It comes from deep insight and recognition of the differences that exist. And a need to play an active role in building bridges in an increasingly diverse Norway. Then Durek Verrett chooses to drag everything down in the mud. It's ugly."

I agree. I even used to follow that guy on his socials, but after this unbelievable damage he - for his own egotistical needs - has unleashed on two of the most inclusive elderly people I can think of, when they're nearing 90... Durek can go to Hell as far as I'm concerned. Yet another American out there destroying the world and creating needless division due to their own damn ignorance.
reply_content: Thank you Shazia Majid for this narrative. You are correct. King Harald is a wonderful person and does not deserve all this. Very sad. Shame on Marthe L. and Durek for putting her parents through all this. Marthe has so many issues.
